summary: Iteration 83: Tested new Guest Intelligence module - spend tracking, amenity tracker, allergen/dietary alerts, special requests, payment methods. All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Guest Intelligence panel working with Dashboard (6 KPIs, Top Guests table) and Profile view (allergen alerts, spend breakdown, amenity suggestions, history by visit, payment methods). Desktop taskbar and guest ordering still working.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Guest Intelligence panel, Dashboard, Profile view, search, taskbar, guest ordering all working)

test_credentials.test_profiles: Room 412 (James Smith, VIP), Room 301 (Sarah Johnson), Room 501 (Michael Chen, VIP)

seed_data_creation: 3 guest profiles seeded with allergens, dietary restrictions, payment methods, amenity history
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 83 tested Guest Intelligence module. Backend APIs: /api/guest-intel/dashboard (KPIs + top guests), /api/guest-intel/profile/{id} (full profile with spend, amenities, payment methods), /api/guest-intel/search (by name, email, room, key ID, loyalty), /api/guest-intel/amenities/{id}/suggestions (filters allergen-incompatible items), /api/guest-intel/amenities/deliver (log delivery), /api/guest-intel/spend/{room} (spend breakdown), /api/guest-intel/profile/{id}/allergens (update allergens), /api/guest-intel/requests (special requests). Frontend panel in sidebar under 'Dashboard & Overview' > 'Guest Intelligence'. Dashboard shows 6 KPIs and Top Guests table. Profile view shows allergen alert box, spend breakdown (IRD/Minibar/Spa/Retail/Total), suggested amenities (fresh), avoid repeating (recent), amenity history by visit, payment methods. Search supports room key ID (e.g., RK-412-001).

backend_api_tests: GET /api/guest-intel/dashboard - returns 3 profiles, 2 VIP, 2 allergy alerts, KPIs
GET /api/guest-intel/profile/412 - returns James Smith with allergens [shellfish, tree nuts], dietary [gluten-free], 7 visits, $24,580 lifetime spend
GET /api/guest-intel/profile/501 - returns Michael Chen with allergens [dairy, eggs], dietary [vegan], 12 visits
GET /api/guest-intel/search?q=RK-412-001 - finds guest by room key
GET /api/guest-intel/amenities/{guest_id}/suggestions - returns suggestions excluding recent amenities, filters allergen-incompatible items
GET /api/guest-intel/spend/412 - returns spend breakdown (IRD, minibar, spa, retail, total)
frontend_guest_intelligence_tests: Guest Intelligence panel opens from sidebar (Dashboard & Overview > Guest Intelligence)
Dashboard tab shows 6 KPIs: Guest Profiles (3), VIP Guests (2), Allergy Alerts (2), Repeat Guests (3), Amenities Given (11), Pending Requests (1)
Dashboard shows Top Guests table with columns: Guest, Room, Visits, Lifetime Spend, Avg/Visit, Allergens, Tags
Top Guests shows Michael Chen ($52,400), James Smith ($24,580), Sarah Johnson ($3,200)
Profile view shows allergen/dietary alert box with colored badges (SHELLFISH, TREE NUTS, PEANUTS, GLUTEN-FREE)
Profile view shows current stay spend breakdown: IRD $226, Minibar $6, Spa $150, Retail $0, Total $382
Profile view shows Suggested Amenities (Fresh): Champagne Split, Fresh Flowers, Cheese & Wine Pairing, etc.
Profile view shows Avoid Repeating (Recent Visits): Welcome Fruit Basket, Chocolate Truffles, etc.
Profile view shows Amenity History by Visit: Visit #4, #5, #6 with amenities
Profile view shows Payment Methods: Amex Platinum ••••4242, Room Key RK-412-001
Search by room key RK-412-001 finds James Smith
frontend_regression_tests: Desktop Taskbar visible with 9 quick-launch icons and clock
Guest ordering /guest-order works: auth → menu with 4 categories (Food & Dining, Beverages, Sundries, Amenities)

guest_intelligence_dashboard.details: 6 KPIs (profiles, VIP, allergy alerts, repeat, amenities, requests) + Top Guests table sorted by lifetime spend

guest_intelligence_profile.details: Full profile with allergen alert box, spend breakdown, amenity suggestions, history by visit, payment methods

guest_intelligence_search.details: Search by name, email, room number, room key ID, loyalty number

amenity_suggestions_filtering.details: Excludes recently given amenities and allergen-incompatible items (e.g., no Chocolate Truffles for tree nut allergy)

spend_tracking.details: Tracks spend across IRD, minibar, spa, retail, guest orders with totals

mocked_apis.email_sending: SendGrid email sending is MOCKED - logs to MongoDB instead (no SENDGRID_API_KEY configured)
